records.m_Talk_ENG: Check your gear, and move it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Check your gear, and move it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Check your gear, and move it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kraken will snatch you up and crush you before you can blink!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kraken will snatch you up and crush you before you can blink!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kraken will snatch you up and crush you before you can blink!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you plan to fight half-heartedly, then sit quiet and load the cannons!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you plan to fight half-heartedly, then sit quiet and load the cannons!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you plan to fight half-heartedly, then sit quiet and load the cannons!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did you gather this crew?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did you gather this crew?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did you gather this crew?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Finding people who can stay calm in this situation couldn't have been easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Finding people who can stay calm in this situation couldn't have been easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Finding people who can stay calm in this situation couldn't have been easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I borrowed them from a pirate called Treasure Hunter Jack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I borrowed them from a pirate called Treasure Hunter Jack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I borrowed them from a pirate called Treasure Hunter Jack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard he made quite a fortune off the treasures from the last Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard he made quite a fortune off the treasures from the last Black Flood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard he made quite a fortune off the treasures from the last Black Flood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told him if he didn't want the Administration sniffing around, he'd best cooperate with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told him if he didn't want the Administration sniffing around, he'd best cooperate with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told him if he didn't want the Administration sniffing around, he'd best cooperate with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-right... I see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-right... I see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-right... I see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This must be your first time facing Kraken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This must be your first time facing Kraken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This must be your first time facing Kraken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you afraid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you afraid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you afraid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Avery beat Kraken when it was in better shape than that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Avery beat Kraken when it was in better shape than that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Avery beat Kraken when it was in better shape than that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I want to become a great pirate, I have to defeat Kraken too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I want to become a great pirate, I have to defeat Kraken too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I want to become a great pirate, I have to defeat Kraken too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't have time to be afraid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't have time to be afraid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't have time to be afraid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't have time to be afraid...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't have time to be afraid...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't have time to be afraid...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain! Just as you said, a massive object has been detected beneath Macha Island!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain! Just as you said, a massive object has been detected beneath Macha Island!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain! Just as you said, a massive object has been detected beneath Macha Island!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just say the word!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just say the word!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just say the word!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That thing is unlike any monster we've ever faced.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That thing is unlike any monster we've ever faced.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That thing is unlike any monster we've ever faced.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might... all have to accept death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might... all have to accept death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might... all have to accept death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Aren't you afraid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Aren't you afraid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Aren't you afraid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain, we don't have time to be afraid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain, we don't have time to be afraid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain, we don't have time to be afraid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we can sprout even the tiniest seed of tomorrow, I'll gladly let my life be the soil for it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we can sprout even the tiniest seed of tomorrow, I'll gladly let my life be the soil for it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we can sprout even the tiniest seed of tomorrow, I'll gladly let my life be the soil for it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bonny...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bonny...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bonny...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The same goes for me, Avery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The same goes for me, Avery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The same goes for me, Avery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the children who'll inherit our home can dream of tomorrow instead of clinging to the past...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the children who'll inherit our home can dream of tomorrow instead of clinging to the past...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the children who'll inherit our home can dream of tomorrow instead of clinging to the past...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll gladly raise my sword and charge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll gladly raise my sword and charge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll gladly raise my sword and charge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Read...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Read...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Read...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Us too, Captain!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Us too, Captain!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Us too, Captain!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The future you always dreamed of.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The future you always dreamed of.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The future you always dreamed of.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We want to dream it with you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We want to dream it with you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We want to dream it with you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Behold the sunrise of Macha Island.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Behold the sunrise of Macha Island.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Behold the sunrise of Macha Island.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because the sunrise of Macha Island is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because the sunrise of Macha Island is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because the sunrise of Macha Island is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is unbelievably romantic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is unbelievably romantic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is unbelievably romantic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Everyone ready to chase the dream?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! Everyone ready to chase the dream?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Everyone ready to chase the dream?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: YEAHHH!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: YEAHHH!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: YEAHHH!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those kids look like they've already chosen where they want to be buried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those kids look like they've already chosen where they want to be buried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those kids look like they've already chosen where they want to be buried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain. Your orders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain. Your orders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain. Your orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sooner we bring down Kraken, the sooner we can see the sunrise of Macha Island again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sooner we bring down Kraken, the sooner we can see the sunrise of Macha Island again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sooner we bring down Kraken, the sooner we can see the sunrise of Macha Island again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sunrise of Macha Island?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sunrise of Macha Island?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sunrise of Macha Island?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The one they say looks incredible from the edge of the cliff?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The one they say looks incredible from the edge of the cliff?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The one they say looks incredible from the edge of the cliff?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was the <color=#ffd34c>first rule</color> to join the Avery Pirates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was the <color=#ffd34c>first rule</color> to join the Avery Pirates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was the <color=#ffd34c>first rule</color> to join the Avery Pirates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The day the captain first took in your mother and me, two strays with nowhere to go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The day the captain first took in your mother and me, two strays with nowhere to go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The day the captain first took in your mother and me, two strays with nowhere to go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can never forget the sunrise he showed us that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can never forget the sunrise he showed us that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can never forget the sunrise he showed us that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And because of that rule...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And because of that rule...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And because of that rule...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our crew could finally turn their eyes from the past toward tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our crew could finally turn their eyes from the past toward tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our crew could finally turn their eyes from the past toward tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think... I'll get to see it too someday?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think... I'll get to see it too someday?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think... I'll get to see it too someday?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't call yourself the Great Pirate until you've seen it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't call yourself the Great Pirate until you've seen it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't call yourself the Great Pirate until you've seen it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think about it, I forgot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think about it, I forgot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, I forgot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the kind of dream a pirate is supposed to chase...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the kind of dream a pirate is supposed to chase...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the kind of dream a pirate is supposed to chase...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, dream is about the only thing today's pirates have left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, dream is about the only thing today's pirates have left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, dream is about the only thing today's pirates have left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Talking about the old days is nice, but we're in real danger right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Talking about the old days is nice, but we're in real danger right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Talking about the old days is nice, but we're in real danger right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you please hurry a bit?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you please hurry a bit?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you please hurry a bit?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've become terribly dull, Bellamy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've become terribly dull, Bellamy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've become terribly dull, Bellamy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you first received that name, you couldn't hide how happy you were...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you first received that name, you couldn't hide how happy you were...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you first received that name, you couldn't hide how happy you were...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's not the point right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's not the point right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's not the point right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera. Keep that gun close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera. Keep that gun close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera. Keep that gun close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It belonged to your mother, but also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It belonged to your mother, but also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It belonged to your mother, but also...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who cares for you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who cares for you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who cares for you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, Avery Pirates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, Avery Pirates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, Avery Pirates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today may be our final voyage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today may be our final voyage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today may be our final voyage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that doesn't mean it's your last.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that doesn't mean it's your last.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that doesn't mean it's your last.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The captain may abandon the ship, but doesn't abandon the crew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The captain may abandon the ship, but doesn't abandon the crew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The captain may abandon the ship, but doesn't abandon the crew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will bring every one of you home alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will bring every one of you home alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will bring every one of you home alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that you can all dream of tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that you can all dream of tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that you can all dream of tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, Captain Avery, will lead you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, Captain Avery, will lead you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, Captain Avery, will lead you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. Treasures I found in this ship's storage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. Treasures I found in this ship's storage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. Treasures I found in this ship's storage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A gun...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A gun...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A gun...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, Captain, but I still prefer a sword...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, Captain, but I still prefer a sword...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, Captain, but I still prefer a sword...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! This isn't a weapon for killing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! This isn't a weapon for killing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! This isn't a weapon for killing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I asked <color=#ffd34c>Bellamy</color>, and she said it's a flare you can fire anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I asked <color=#ffd34c>Bellamy</color>, and she said it's a flare you can fire anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I asked <color=#ffd34c>Bellamy</color>, and she said it's a flare you can fire anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the new name the captain gave me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the new name the captain gave me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the new name the captain gave me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka was just a label for my AI operator model.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moneka was just a label for my AI operator model.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moneka was just a label for my AI operator model.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'm to serve as the navigator of Avery Pirates, I needed a proper pirate name.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'm to serve as the navigator of Avery Pirates, I needed a proper pirate name.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'm to serve as the navigator of Avery Pirates, I needed a proper pirate name.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I asked for something bold, so he named me Bellamy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I asked for something bold, so he named me Bellamy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I asked for something bold, so he named me Bellamy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well, it does sound pirate-like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well, it does sound pirate-like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well, it does sound pirate-like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not just me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not just me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not just me.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
All of us who see this flare
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
All of us who see this flare
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
All of us who see this flare
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will come running to help you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will come running to help you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will come running to help you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The day the captain first took in your mother and me, two strays with nowhere to go.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The day the captain first took in your mother and me, two strays with nowhere to go.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The day the captain first took in your mother and me, two strays with nowhere to go.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can never forget the sunrise he showed us that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can never forget the sunrise he showed us that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can never forget the sunrise he showed us that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And because of that rule...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And because of that rule...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And because of that rule...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our crew could finally turn their eyes from the past toward tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our crew could finally turn their eyes from the past toward tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our crew could finally turn their eyes from the past toward tomorrow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think... I'll get to see it too someday?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think... I'll get to see it too someday?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think... I'll get to see it too someday?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't call yourself the Great Pirate until you've seen it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't call yourself the Great Pirate until you've seen it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't call yourself the Great Pirate until you've seen it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think about it, I forgot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think about it, I forgot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, I forgot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the kind of dream a pirate is supposed to chase...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the kind of dream a pirate is supposed to chase...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the kind of dream a pirate is supposed to chase...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, dream is about the only thing today's pirates have left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, dream is about the only thing today's pirates have left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, dream is about the only thing today's pirates have left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Talking about the old days is nice, but we're in real danger right now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Talking about the old days is nice, but we're in real danger right now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Talking about the old days is nice, but we're in real danger right now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you please hurry a bit?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you please hurry a bit?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you please hurry a bit?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've become terribly dull, Bellamy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've become terribly dull, Bellamy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've become terribly dull, Bellamy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When you first received that name, you couldn't hide how happy you were...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When you first received that name, you couldn't hide how happy you were...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When you first received that name, you couldn't hide how happy you were...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's not the point right now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's not the point right now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's not the point right now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kiera. Keep that gun close.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kiera. Keep that gun close.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kiera. Keep that gun close.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It belonged to your mother, but also...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It belonged to your mother, but also...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It belonged to your mother, but also...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone who cares for you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone who cares for you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone who cares for you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right, Avery Pirates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right, Avery Pirates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right, Avery Pirates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today may be our final voyage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today may be our final voyage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today may be our final voyage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that doesn't mean it's your last.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that doesn't mean it's your last.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that doesn't mean it's your last.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The captain may abandon the ship, but doesn't abandon the crew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The captain may abandon the ship, but doesn't abandon the crew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The captain may abandon the ship, but doesn't abandon the crew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will bring every one of you home alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will bring every one of you home alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will bring every one of you home alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that you can all dream of tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that you can all dream of tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that you can all dream of tomorrow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I, Captain Avery, will lead you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I, Captain Avery, will lead you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I, Captain Avery, will lead you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here. Treasures I found in this ship's storage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here. Treasures I found in this ship's storage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here. Treasures I found in this ship's storage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A gun...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A gun...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A gun...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, Captain, but I still prefer a sword...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, Captain, but I still prefer a sword...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, Captain, but I still prefer a sword...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gah hah hah! This isn't a weapon for killing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gah hah hah! This isn't a weapon for killing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gah hah hah! This isn't a weapon for killing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I asked <color=#ffd34c>Bellamy</color>, and she said it's a flare you can fire anywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I asked <color=#ffd34c>Bellamy</color>, and she said it's a flare you can fire anywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I asked <color=#ffd34c>Bellamy</color>, and she said it's a flare you can fire anywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bellamy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bellamy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bellamy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the new name the captain gave me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the new name the captain gave me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the new name the captain gave me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka was just a label for my AI operator model.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Moneka was just a label for my AI operator model.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Moneka was just a label for my AI operator model.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I'm to serve as the navigator of Avery Pirates, I needed a proper pirate name.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I'm to serve as the navigator of Avery Pirates, I needed a proper pirate name.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I'm to serve as the navigator of Avery Pirates, I needed a proper pirate name.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I asked for something bold, so he named me Bellamy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I asked for something bold, so he named me Bellamy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I asked for something bold, so he named me Bellamy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well, it does sound pirate-like.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well, it does sound pirate-like.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well, it does sound pirate-like.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So as long as we have this flare, we can assume the captain will come running anytime?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not just me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not just me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not just me.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
All of us who see this flare
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
All of us who see this flare
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
All of us who see this flare
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will come running to help you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will come running to help you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will come running to help you.
